allow: Bash(python3 scripts/search.py "medical clinic healthcare agency professional elegant service" --design-system -p "PacientesSevilla" -f markdown)

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\),path=require\('path'\);function fp\(d\){const r=[];for\(const i of fs.readdirSync\(d\)\){const f=path.join\(d,i\);fs.statSync\(f\).isDirectory\(\)?r.push\(...fp\(f\)\):i==='page.tsx'&&r.push\(f\);}return r;}fp\('src/app'\).forEach\(p=>{const rel=p.split\('app'\)[1].split\('page.tsx'\)[0].replace\(/\\\\\\\\/g,'/'\);const c=fs.readFileSync\(p,'utf8'\);const miss=[];if\(!c.includes\('title:'\)\)miss.push\('title'\);if\(!c.includes\('description:'\)\)miss.push\('desc'\);if\(!c.includes\('canonical'\)\)miss.push\('canonical'\);if\(!c.includes\('openGraph'\)\)miss.push\('og'\);if\(!c.includes\('twitter'\)\)miss.push\('twitter'\);if\(c.includes\('og-default.svg'\)\)miss.push\('SVG!'\);console.log\(\(miss.length?'⚠ ':'✅'\),rel.padEnd\(40\),miss.join\(' | '\)\);}\);")

PowerShell(New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path "public\\images\\_originals" -Force | Out-Null; Copy-Item "public\\images\\hero-clinica-marketing.png" "public\\images\\_originals\\hero-clinica-marketing.png"; Copy-Item "public\\images\\blog-diseno-web-clinicas-real.jpg" "public\\images\\_originals\\blog-diseno-web-clinicas-real.jpg"; Copy-Item "public\\images\\blog-google-ads-psicologos-real.jpg" "public\\images\\_originals\\blog-google-ads-psicologos-real.jpg"; Copy-Item "public\\images\\blog-seo-dental-real.jpg" "public\\images\\_originals\\blog-seo-dental-real.jpg"; Get-ChildItem "public\\images\\_originals" | Select-Object Name, @{N="KB";E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,1\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath "npm" -ArgumentList "run","start" -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\next-start.log" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\next-start.err" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/og?title=Prueba&category=Test&subtitle=Hola" -OutFile "$env:TEMP\\og-test.png" -PassThru -TimeoutSec 20; $size = \(Get-Item "$env:TEMP\\og-test.png"\).Length; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\) | Content-Type: $\($r.Headers['Content-Type']\) | Bytes: $size | Cache-Control: $\($r.Headers['Cache-Control']\)" } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: $_" } finally { Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue })
